{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032202201050EE4DB659A4944D8FAB"}"},"total":2079},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7485029103228109592","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很棒，终于碰见一本不是舔夏禾的了。其他同人的好像作者中了刮胡刀一样，不是女主是夏禾，就是后宫之一有夏禾。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1742750015,"group_id":"7471211401080491033","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1IppR7JUjRjGqGZYomC4Qw=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704205&x-signature=yZBRyurrKDTyW8Ks9x781%2BPALhc%3D","user_id":"6237179461","user_name":"爱吃香油炸绿豆的老程"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"6237179461","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1729250309,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7471211401080491033","book_info":{"abstract":"【一人同人，系统，搞笑轻松，无敌，无女主，杀伐果断，正的发邪，没有洗白夏禾...】
张玄霄穿越到了一人世界，幼时父母惨死在全性手上，侥幸没死的他被老天师带到龙虎山，成为了张灵玉的师哥...
身为天师亲传弟子，又有丧亲仇恨，这一世张玄霄发誓见一个全性便杀一个全性...
全性:“张道长，我错了，饶我一条活路吧。”
张玄霄:“你不是知道错了，你只是知道你要死了！”
夏禾:“难道就因为我是全性，就该死么？”
张玄霄:“你不死难道我死？妖女速速受死！”
哪都通:“他已经投降了，玄霄真人收手吧！”
张玄霄:“一天是全性，一辈子都是全性！”
...
就在张玄霄除魔卫道之时，他又觉醒了正义系统，只要行心中正义之事就能获得奖励...
自此一位正的发邪的天师府弟子出现了。
